title: Forgotten Password
cardText: Recover access when a password has been forgotten.
Identify the account type before attempting recovery.
Follow the correct recovery process for local, Microsoft, email, website, or network accounts.
text: This guide is for situations where a password has been forgotten.
The recovery process depends on the type of account involved.
Use official recovery methods whenever possible.

identifyAccountType.title: Identify account type
body: Determine what account you are trying to access.
Different account types have different recovery methods.

windowsAccountType.title: Identify Windows account type
body: Determine whether the computer uses a Microsoft account or a local account.
Microsoft accounts can usually be recovered online.
Local accounts have more limited recovery options.

recoverMicrosoftAccount.title: Recover Microsoft account
body: Use Microsoft's official account recovery process.
Verify ownership using recovery email, phone number, or other verification methods.
Once the password is reset, sign in again.

checkLocalPasswordReset.title: Check for password reset options
body: Determine whether a password reset disk or another administrator account is available.
These are the safest recovery methods for local accounts.

usePasswordResetOption.title: Use password reset option
body: Use the available reset method.
Create a new password and verify access.
Store the password securely afterwards.

localAccountEscalation.title: Local account recovery required
body: No supported recovery method is available.
Recovery may require another administrator account, account recreation, or operating system recovery.
Back up data before performing major recovery operations.

onlineAccountType.title: Identify online account type
body: Determine whether this is an email account, website account, or business/network account.
Most online services provide built-in recovery options.

useOnlineRecovery.title: Use account recovery tools
body: Select Forgot Password on the service login page.
Follow the recovery instructions.
Verify identity using the registered email address, phone number, or recovery methods.

checkRecoveryAccess.title: Check access to recovery methods
body: Determine whether you still have access to the recovery email address or phone number.
Without access, identity verification may be more difficult.

retryRecovery.title: Retry account recovery
body: Use the available recovery method again.
Carefully verify account details during recovery.

providerEscalation.title: Contact service provider
body: Recovery methods are unavailable or inaccessible.
Contact the provider's support team for identity verification assistance.
Be prepared to provide proof of account ownership.

contactAdministrator.title: Contact administrator
body: Business and network accounts are often managed by an administrator.
Contact the appropriate IT support team or system administrator.
Request a password reset or account unlock.
